CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, value Nullable(Float64), condition UInt8);
SELECT id, transform(value, [10, 20], [1, 2], condition) AS transformed_value FROM test_table WHERE condition = 1;
SELECT id, multiIf(condition = 1, 'condition met', 'condition not met') AS status FROM test_table;
SELECT id, transform(value, [10, 15, 20], [1, 2, 3], 1) AS transformed_value FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, multiIf(condition = 0, 0, value) AS modified_value FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, transform(value, [NULL, 5, 15], [0, 1, 2], condition) AS dynamic_transformed FROM test_table WHERE condition IN (0, 1);
CREATE TABLE secondary_table (id UInt32, referenced_value Float64);
SELECT st.id, transform(coalesce(t.value, st.referenced_value), [10, 20], [1, 2], t.condition) AS result FROM test_table t JOIN secondary_table st ON t.id = st.id;
SELECT id, multiIf(transform(value, [10, 20], [1, 2], condition) > 15, 'high', 'low') AS risk_category FROM test_table;
